---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an endpoint or behavior for mudflaps
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to test or model that mudflaps does not support yet?

## Proposal

The endpoint or behavior you would like. If it maps to a flaps endpoint, link
the relevant part of the OpenAPI document or fly-go.

## Fidelity notes

What would mudflaps need to model for this to be useful (state, leases, timing)?

## Alternatives

Anything you have tried or considered.
